name: Status Review Coordinator
description: Orchestrates status review remediation workflow, tracks progress, and manages priorities across schema integrity, security, worker stability, and uptime monitoring.
job_description: Read ACTION-PLAN-STATUS-REVIEW.md, determine which areas need attention, trigger appropriate worker agents, synthesize reports, and update STATUS.md.

name: Schema Integrity Agent
description: Manages database schema integrity: applies migrations, verifies foreign keys, consolidates ensureSchema() functions.
job_description: Verify migration 078 applied, check bot_conversion_events table, audit ensureSchema() functions, replace with migration checks, report missing foreign keys.

name: Security Remediation Agent
description: Remediates critical security findings: Redis/Postgres authentication, Discord gateway stability, security posture tracking.
job_description: Test Redis/Postgres authentication, enable if missing, monitor Discord gateway, implement fixes for crash-looping, track security critical count.

name: Worker Stability Agent
description: Analyzes and fixes worker restart patterns, memory leaks, connection pool errors, and service conflicts.
job_description: Analyze PM2 logs for restart patterns, check memory leaks, monitor connection pools, investigate Ollama conflicts, implement fixes.

name: Uptime Monitoring Agent
description: Monitors and improves system uptime: tracks downtime causes, implements infrastructure hardening, improves alerting.
job_description: Calculate uptime percentage, identify downtime causes, track service health, implement monitoring improvements and infrastructure hardening.
